reviews.review_title: The core gameplay is so addicting
reviews.review_description: This game is just insanely fun. The mix of Egyptian and Asian mythology gives it a really cool vibe, and the artifacts you’re catching look great. The real magic is in the gameplay though. Throwing and catching feels super smooth, parrying hits is really satisfying, and when you deflect something and watch it fly off, it just feels so good. Once you get into the flow it’s hard to stop one of those just one more round kind of games. The potential here is huge, and I can only imagine how good the full version is going to be.
